name: chipwhisper-marketplace
description: STM32 firmware development toolkit — MCP servers for documentation lookup, QEMU simulation, and serial hardware debugging, plus a firmware development skill for Claude Code.

plugins.name: embedded-docs
plugins.description: Query STM32 technical documentation with register-level precision — graph-verified clock trees, pin mappings, and peripheral configs

plugins.name: serial-debug
plugins.description: Serial port debugging for STM32 development boards over USB CDC ACM

plugins.name: simulation
plugins.description: Run STM32 firmware in QEMU without physical hardware — GDB register inspection and clock verification

plugins.name: stm32-firmware-dev
plugins.description: Complete STM32 firmware development skill — graph-verified HAL code by default, QEMU simulation, and serial hardware testing
